checks.name: branch_independent_repo_sync
checks.detail: Fresh verification confirmed `packages/bootstrap/src/install/repo.ts` no longer checks out the requested local branch for update/current sync. The flow now fetches the requested branch, resolves `FETCH_HEAD^{commit}`, and detaches to the fetched commit.

checks.name: linked_worktree_regression_coverage
checks.detail: Fresh bootstrap and workspace tests include `syncRepository updates an existing checkout via the fetched commit without checking out the target branch`, proving the old `git checkout main` dependency is gone from the shared sync path.

checks.name: fresh_verification_commands
checks.detail: Fresh `pnpm --filter @happytg/bootstrap run test`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm build`, and `pnpm happytg task validate --repo . --task HTG-2026-04-19-installer-remote-ref-sync` all exited 0 on this branch.
